name: Yale - Financial Markets (Robert Shiller)
description: Nobel laureate Robert Shiller's legendary course on how financial markets work. Covers insurance, banking, securities, behavioral finance.

name: QuantConnect Bootcamp
description: Hands-on algorithmic trading tutorials using LEAN engine. Build strategies in Python with real market data.

name: Financial Engineering and Risk Management
description: Columbia University specialization: derivatives pricing, term structure models, computational methods. Rigorous and math-heavy.

name: tastylive Learn Center
description: Thousands of hours of free options education. Research-backed approach focusing on selling premium and managing probability.

name: Machine Learning for Trading
description: Apply ML to trading: Q-learning for portfolio optimization. Part of Georgia Tech OMSCS program.

name: Khan Academy - Finance & Capital Markets
description: Covers stocks, bonds, interest, inflation, and basic financial concepts. Excellent visual explanations with exercises.

name: MIT OpenCourseWare - Finance Theory I
description: Full MIT finance course: present value, portfolio theory, CAPM, and options pricing. Lectures, problem sets, exams.

name: Investopedia Simulator + Tutorials
description: Free stock market simulator plus hundreds of tutorials on trading basics, options, technical and fundamental analysis.

name: Babypips School of Pipsology
description: Comprehensive free forex curriculum from beginner to advanced. Charts, indicators, risk management, psychology.

name: Financial Engineering and Risk Management
description: Columbia University specialization: derivatives pricing, term structure models, computational methods. Rigorous and math-heavy.

name: Machine Learning for Trading
description: Apply ML to trading: Q-learning for portfolio optimization. Part of Georgia Tech OMSCS program.

name: Investment Management with Python and ML
description: Four-course specialization: portfolio construction, optimization, and advanced risk management using Python.

name: Python for Financial Analysis
description: Practical Python for finance: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib. Build trading algorithms and perform quantitative analysis.

name: Computational Investing Part I
description: Build a market simulator, analyze portfolio performance, implement technical indicators. Hands-on with real data.

name: Certificate in Quantitative Finance (CQF)
description: Six-month intensive: stochastic calculus, derivatives, numerical methods, ML for finance. Industry gold standard for quant credentials.

name: MicroMasters in Finance
description: Graduate-level MIT finance: corporate finance, derivatives, mathematical methods. Can count toward a full MIT master's.

name: MSc Financial Engineering (Tuition-Free)
description: Fully online, tuition-free master's degree in financial engineering. Econometrics, derivatives, algo trading. Highly selective.

name: CME Group Education
description: Free courses on futures, options, derivatives from the world's largest derivatives exchange. Interactive simulations.

name: tastylive Learn Center
description: Thousands of hours of free options education. Research-backed approach focusing on selling premium and managing probability.

name: Schwab thinkorswim Education
description: Webcasts, articles, and videos covering stocks, options, futures. Especially strong on the thinkorswim platform.

name: Interactive Brokers Traders' Academy
description: Free courses on trading technology, market structure, order types, and global markets. Strong on execution and microstructure.

name: Kaggle Learn - ML + Time Series
description: Practical ML courses with runnable notebooks. Apply ML to financial datasets in competitions.

name: Option Alpha Courses
description: Structured options courses from fundamentals to automation. Systematic, probability-based approach.

name: Quantopian Lectures (Archived)
description: Archived Jupyter notebooks: factor models, pairs trading, Kalman filters, portfolio optimization.
